---
title: "Harder_Simulation_updated"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-01"
---

```{r}
nsim <- 5000
p_values <-numeric(nsim)
```

```{r}
for (s in 1:nsim) {
        dats <- expand.grid( 
          Rep = factor(1:reps), 
          Rootstock = factor(treatments)
        )
  mu <- 0 
  
  beta_j <- rnorm(reps, mean = 0, sd = 5)
  names(beta_j) <- levels(dats$Rep)
  eps <- rnorm(nrow(dat), mean = 0, sd= 10)
  dat$y <- mu + 
    beta_j[dat$Rep] + 
    eps
  fit <- aov(y ~ Rootstock + Rep, data = dat)
  p_values[s] <- summary(fit)[[1]]["Rootstock", "Pr(>F)"]
}
```

```{r}
mean(p_values < 0.05)
```
